suppressions.name: deployToHyperLiquid
suppressions.rationale: Reviewed in the 2026-06-09 target smart-contract buildout refresh and refreshed after R8-M-01/R9-M-01. The bridge deploy path is nonReentrant, records the approved registry destination before measuring the vault transfer, calls the timelocked RISKUSDVault deploy port, requires an exact USDC balance delta, forwards that verified delta to the configured cold account, and updates deployed accounting only after the transfer succeeds. Re-keyed against the 2026-06-18 Slither 0.11.5 JSON output after external-audit closeout edits changed the finding hash while detector/file/name stayed the same.

suppressions.name: distributePartnership
suppressions.rationale: Reviewed in the 2026-06-09 target smart-contract buildout refresh; re-keyed against the 2026-06-15 Slither 0.11.5 JSON output after the finding hash changed but detector/file/name stayed the same. Partnership distribution creates and configures a dedicated vesting wallet before recording aggregate distribution, and the wallet/token calls are to retained internal ports; FORAGETreasury target tests cover caps, blocklist, delegation, and distribution accounting.
